message:
test(core): add AUTOINCREMENT + CURRENT_TIMESTAMP reopen compatibility test; simplify vtab rollback_to

Add test verifying that tables with AUTOINCREMENT primary keys and
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP default columns produce rusqlite-compatible results
after database close and reopen, including correct typeof() for
timestamp values and proper index integrity.

Simplify TransactionalVtabState::rollback_to() by replacing the
explicit is_none() guard with idiomatic as_ref()? early return.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
